mode_module.title: OpenAI Review Mode
mode_module.purpose: Review OpenAI integrations for correctness, validation, safety, privacy, reliability and traceability.

required_checks.check: OpenAI platform claims are grounded in official OpenAI documentation.
Model, endpoint, input, output and tool configuration are explicit.
Function-call arguments and Structured Outputs are schema-validated and application-validated.
Retrieval sources, vector store provenance, file freshness and data permissions are recorded.
Rate-limit, retry, backoff and idempotency behaviour is defined.
High-stakes, user-facing or code-generation outputs have human-review controls.
Logging avoids secrets, API keys, unnecessary personal data and hidden reasoning.
